Like, you know, I lightly looked at, you know.

What they do, like, told me to give you the elevator pitch, I wouldn't be able to do it, so, but, yeah, like, where, catch me up on, like, where you're at in the current state of the work, where you feel like you need my input, and the other part, I wasn't super clear on, I think Andy mentioned, but I'm just forgetting, when, when is your next step of, like, actually having this conversation with them?

Yeah, so, QBR is scheduled for Thursday, but, but actually, Tim, the CRO, he's going to join, and he's only got half an hour on Thursday, so I've suggested actually pushing this to Monday and Tuesday, Monday or Tuesday, because I will need more time with him, so I'm hoping he takes the bait there, and it gives me a little bit more runway, because if there's a couple of things in play, that I'd like to have before that, number one being, like, don't panic.
A content audit.
Khalil's running that at the moment.
We have some preliminary takeaways, which kind of confirm my suspicions here.

I think your read is right.

Performance is returning primarily due to, I rebuilt, well, when I joined, we were basically out of topics.
So I joined in December, we had run out of topics.
So I went and did a load of keyword research on some new priority clusters, and I think, probably that strategy is starting to pay off because we're deploying.
Um,

So it's definitely a good story.
And I think in general, I'll position this QBR around, you we have three months left in this contract.

And I think that's the story with Immubet.
I definitely see like, let's say the first.

And I think I probably see quite a bit of early stage AROPs and keyword gap analysis type approach where it was like spray and pray and the content wasn't approached with SEO as the core focus.
So looking back through, there's just a ton of duplicate or mismatched alignment or et cetera, et cetera.

yeah, am I like, I think there may have been one or two in there, but certainly like the vast majority is us going back to April.

Refreshing.

And oftentimes, like what can get you past that, unless you have some like untapped net new audience with tons of headroom or some other play, is by going through and like taking that fresh perspective of the signals we learned and like, how can you, how can you adapt what we've done thus far, looking back at our previous content, enriching it, refreshing it, improving it.
Yeah.

Any program I've worked on in the past, you know, take home base, for example, like part of the way we drove a lot of their initial growth is they had a decent amount of content when they joined, but we were able to get it to 2x growth in like five, four or five.
Because we focused in, first and foremost, as we were building some of the net new and parallel, we were doing a lot of refreshing and consolidation.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Imubit QBR strategy and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**QBR Postponed:** The QBR is moving from Thursday to Monday/Tuesday to secure more time with CRO Tim, who requested a review of the SoW and backlinking performance.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**Narrative Shift:** The strategy will pivot from new content to refreshing the 200-article library. This is framed as a natural program evolution, not a failure, and aligns with Imubit's own messaging changes.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [**Backlinking Strategy:** To address Tim's concern, the team will use Ahrefs data showing a near 2x growth in referring domains, which contrasts with SEMrush's flat trend and provides a positive story.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Conversion Focus:** The team will proactively address conversion by highlighting low engagement as an opportunity and suggesting tactics like content kits, while acknowledging Imubit's current lack of attribution tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

## Topics

### QBR Context & Performance

  - [**Performance:** Matthew confirmed a recent upward trend, which he attributes to new keyword research and quick-win article refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Content Audit:** A preliminary audit by Khalil confirms Matthew's suspicion of a "spray and pray" strategy in the initial 200 articles, resulting in duplicate content and poor keyword alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [200 articles published → \~150 clicks/week.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [This content drives \~30% of Imubit's total website clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### New Strategy: Content Refresh

  - [**Rationale:** The program has hit diminishing returns from new content. The solution is to refresh the existing library based on performance data and new business priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Framing:** Position this as a natural program evolution, not a negative. Kyle cited the Homebase case study, where a refresh-first strategy drove 2x growth.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [**Client Alignment:** Imubit is already aligned on a refresh, driven by their own messaging shift from "closed loop AI as a solution" to "closed loop is a North Star."](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Dual Focus:** The strategy combines refresh with new content (60 assignments) to cover new verticals and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

### Backlinking Performance

  - [**Client Concern:** CRO Tim specifically requested a review of backlinking performance, which has not been reported on since the program began.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Data Discrepancy:** Ahrefs shows a near 2x growth in referring domains, while SEMrush shows a flat trend.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Action:** Matthew will use the Ahrefs data to tell a positive story, focusing on the growth in referring domains and Domain Authority. He is awaiting details from Jesus on which pages received links.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

### Conversion & Attribution

  - [**Client Gap:** Imubit lacks internal attribution tracking for organic pipeline, though they plan to build a dashboard and hire a paid agency in Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**Framing:** Position low engagement as an opportunity to drive more conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [**Suggested Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
      - [**Content Kits:** Bundle existing ungated assets (webinars, guides) into themed kits behind a form. This tactic has a high success rate.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
      - [**LLM Visibility:** Frame the refresh as an opportunity to optimize for LLM search, building on existing work (TLDRs, FAQs).](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [Propose moving the QBR to Monday or Tuesday to secure more time with CRO Tim.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [Finalize the QBR deck, focusing on the refresh narrative and using Ahrefs data for backlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
      - [Prepare to discuss conversion opportunities and Imubit's attribution plans.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**Khalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Complete the content audit to provide detailed findings for the QBR.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Jesus:**](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
      - [Provide Matthew with details on which pages received backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/cizqEVX4jLkQwwimf7uTASxjMSKAB1nN?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

action_items.description: Draft QBR deck for Tim & Tara: wins, refresh plan, LLM visibility, conversion/engagement, backlink summary (Ahrefs)
Review Imubit articles; identify engagement/conversion opportunities (CTAs, kits)
